hero.eyebrow: Custom Homes · Sunshine Coast & Powell River
hero.subtitle: Family-owned builders crafting custom homes, renovations, and outdoor structures across the Sunshine Coast and Powell River — rooted in West Coast architecture and sustainable construction.

breaks.alt: Hanson Land & Sea — Dwell Magazine feature
Forest Project by Hanson Land & Sea
Gower Point by Hanson Land & Sea

paragraphs: Hanson Land & Sea is a family-owned construction company serving the Sunshine Coast and Powell River. Marlin and Ryan Hanson bring deep local knowledge, skilled trades collaboration, and a shared commitment to West Coast architecture and sustainable building practices.

From custom homes to heritage renovations and thoughtful outdoor structures, every project reflects the same values — native materials, clean craftsmanship, and a respect for the landscape that defines coastal British Columbia.

steps.title: Envision
steps.desc: We listen to how you want to live in your space, studying the site and landscape that will shape every decision.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Working alongside your architect, we refine materials, systems, and details to match the vision and the coast.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Our skilled trades team brings decades of local experience, building with care for native materials and lasting quality.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.desc: A home that belongs to its landscape — built to weather the coast and stand for generations.

testimonial.quote: Great project and cost management, good communication throughout, and highly professional craftsmen. Hanson Land & Sea delivered exactly what we envisioned.
testimonial.name: Chris Battson

services.name: Custom Homes
services.desc: Design-build homes tailored to coastal living — from oceanfront retreats to forest hideaways.

services.name: Renovations
services.desc: Thoughtful additions and major renovations that respect the existing structure while transforming how you live.

services.name: Outdoor Structures
services.desc: Saunas, studios, and outdoor spaces built with the same craftsmanship as our custom homes.

contact.subtitle: Every Hanson Land & Sea project starts with a conversation about your vision, your site, and the home you want to come back to.

footer.description: Family-owned builders serving the Sunshine Coast and Powell River. West Coast architecture, sustainable construction, and a commitment to craftsmanship on every project.
